problem.heading:
Botanicals locked out by the wall of standardization.
A $45B botanical drug market is waiting.

problem.label: PROBLEM
problem.title: Botanicals resist standardization
problem.body: Field and greenhouse cultivation expose plants to uncontrollable variables. Climate soil harvest season and pesticide exposure all shift active compound content from one harvest to the next. Pharmaceutical-grade standardization is effectively impossible.

opportunity.label: OPPORTUNITY
opportunity.title: $45B botanical drug market
opportunity.body: The FDA-aligned global botanical drug market grows from $45B in 2024 to $81B by 2033. Market entry has one prerequisite. A standardized API supply.

mat.heading:
MAT.
We trigger the plant's own defense
to surface active compounds on purpose.
mat.body: MAT (Metabolite Agriculture Technology) targets active compound yield rather than biomass growth. Specific UV-B wavelengths brief thermal shocks regulated water deficit and mineral cues are applied as precision stressors to induce secondary metabolite production.

stressors.label: STRESSOR 01
stressors.title: UV-B Light
stressors.caption: Targeted wavelength induces secondary metabolite synthesis

stressors.label: STRESSOR 02
stressors.title: Thermal Shock
stressors.caption: Short heat and cold pulses trigger defense pathways

stressors.label: STRESSOR 03
stressors.title: Water Deficit
stressors.caption: Controlled drought stress without compromising survival

stressors.label: STRESSOR 04
stressors.title: Mineral Cue
stressors.caption: Specific nutrient blends activate biosynthesis routes

fda.heading:
The FDA's five guidelines.
WSB is built around the core production requirements.
fda.lede: The five core requirements the FDA applies to botanical drug approval. Conventional cultivation struggles to address them at the same time. WSB's precision-controlled smart farm and MAT are structured around raw-material identity, records, contaminant control, quality consistency, and long-term supply stability.

rows.wsb: Only genetically validated seeds. DNA marker verification of identity
Digital SOP controls every environmental variable. Every step recorded as data
Closed-type fully isolated facility. Heavy metals pesticides microbes blocked at source
Active compound consistency across batches. Chemical fingerprint database built
365-day identical-condition production. Long-term supply stability data secured

fda.disclaimer: This matrix shows FDA guideline alignment. Certification and approval follow a separate process.

traction.heading:
Proven by data.
Backed by production scale.
traction.lede: MAT and the precision-controlled smart farm prove active-compound gains and batch consistency with data. The Yeoncheon production center's capacity and our clinical material supply record back it up.

batch.label: BATCH VARIATION
batch.caption: Across all key compounds batch to batch

traction.label: ANNUAL CAPACITY
traction.caption: Annual production capacity, Yeoncheon center (per plant)

traction.networkNote: We collaborate with partners across solution, material, and brand lines in Korea and abroad. Confirmed contracts and milestones are announced through News as they become public.

business.heading:
Technology. Material. Brand.
A three-pillar vertical stack.
business.lede: The same MAT and precision-controlled smart farm power three businesses: solution sales, material supply, and a direct-to-consumer brand.

pillars.label: PILLAR 01
pillars.title: B2B Solution
pillars.subtitle: Technology as a product
pillars.body: MAT digital cultivation recipes precision control software and the controlled-environment hardware stack are sold as one integrated solution. We close the technology gap for our customers in a single deal.
pillars.metricCaption: Recipe, control software, and facility as one

pillars.label: PILLAR 02
pillars.title: B2B Material
pillars.subtitle: Standardized API supply
pillars.body: We produce and supply cGMP-grade botanical drug APIs high-potency nutraceutical ingredients and efficacy-verified cosmetic botanicals. A stable cash-generating business.
cases: Botanical drug API clinical material supply

pillars.label: PILLAR 03
pillars.title: Phytopresso
pillars.subtitle: Validating value as a brand
pillars.body: Phytochemical Espresso. A high-concentration line of natural functional compounds. A premium healthcare lineup built on our hydroponic Cheongsam ginseng. The brand validates our material in the consumer market.
pillars.metricCaption: Hydroponic Ginseng SHOT · Angelica DECURSIN · Dendropanax CGA
cases: B2C distribution outsourced to a marketing specialist

pipeline.heading: Six botanical pipelines on the same platform.
pipeline.lede: Each new plant species adds a new API on top of the same precision-controlled smart farm and MAT stack. Ginseng is already commercial. Isatis is shipping clinical material. Four more are at R&D completion.

news.heading: Latest updates.
news.lede: Contracts, clinical material supply, certifications, and media coverage from WSB's operating pipeline.

items.title: Recognized as a Green Bio enterprise
items.summary: Ministry-recognized as a Green Bio company. Accelerates plant-based functional material business.

items.title: National R&D project · Smart Farm Multi-Ministry Package

items.title: Crohn's-disease botanical API supplied
items.summary: Indirubin-rich Isatis clinical material, 100kg supplied. Proves standardized botanical drug production capability.

roadmap.heading:
Phase 1 foundation.
Phase 2 expansion.
Phase 3 standard.
roadmap.lede: FDA compliance and Korean traction in Phase 1. Global expansion and cGMP scale-up in Phase 2. Evolution into a botanical data platform in Phase 3.

phases.label: PHASE 01
phases.title: Foundation and validation
bullets: GACP certification and full FDA botanical-drug guideline match
Lead the Korean B2B high-potency botanical material market
Commercialize three or more pipelines beyond ginseng

phases.label: PHASE 02
phases.title: Global expansion and scale-up
bullets: Full-scale export of MAT-AI smart farm solutions
Registered FDA botanical drug API supplier

phases.label: PHASE 03
phases.title: Market leadership and standards
bullets: Core API supplier in the global botanical drug market
Botanical data platform owning cultivation and bioactive data
AI-driven new-material discovery and personalized healthcare
